title: Craft More Stones!
description: Adds crafting recipes for the uncraftable stone types
body:
Allows you to craft the 7 main stone types which don't currently have a recipe in Vanilla

All recipes are shapeless and produce 2 of the desired block

Recipes are shown in the gallery as well

* Basalt: 1 Blackstone + 1 Deepslate
* Blackstone: 2 Cobblestone + 2 Coal
* Calcite: 2 Stone + 2 Quartz
* Cobbled Deepslate: 1 Cobblestone + 1 Blackstone
* End Stone: 2 Cobblestone + 2 Popped Chorus Fruit
* Netherrack: 2 Cobblestone + 2 Crimson Roots
* Tuff: 1 Cobblestone + 1 Andesite
